description: Investment-grade municipal bonds providing tax-exempt income for high-bracket investors.
Multi-asset income portfolio targeting 4-5% annual yield with capital preservation focus.
Equity fund investing in companies meeting environmental, social, and governance criteria.
Concentrated exposure to healthcare and biotech sectors.
Trust structure providing income stream with remainder to charity, offering tax benefits.
Diversified commercial real estate portfolio for qualified investors seeking income and appreciation.
